footer.tagline: Premium limited-edition clothing. Made in Portugal, built to last.

home.heroSubtitle: Premium limited-edition clothing. Every piece is built to last, made to stand out.
home.splitParticularDesc: Heavyweight tees, long sleeves, premium basics — the foundations of the CST wardrobe.
home.splitProDesc: Technical cargo pants, fleece track pants — bottoms built for daily wear, morning to night.
home.stripText: Every piece is produced in limited quantities. When it's gone, it's gone. No restock, no sales.
home.collectionDesc: Two tees, two trousers. Each reference available in black. Some in a secondary colourway.
home.valuesDesc: No fast fashion, no seasons. We drop pieces when they're ready, in controlled quantities, using materials that age well.
home.valuesQuote: "We don't try to make a lot. We try to make it right."
home.fumiDesc: 320 g/m² cotton, dense twill, French fleece — materials chosen for durability, not margin.
home.fumiPipesDesc: 320 g/m² on tees, 340 g/m² on cargos
home.fumiCharcoalDesc: Material certifications across the full range
home.preorderWhyDesc1: We don't manufacture at scale. Every drop is a numbered series, produced once. No restock, no sales, no clearance.
home.preorderWhyDesc2: This model lets us control quality at every step, choose the best materials, and deliver pieces we're proud of.
home.step1Desc: Add your piece to the cart, choose your size. Secure payment.
home.step2Desc: Your order is prepared and shipped within 48 business hours.
home.step3Desc: Free shipping in France. Tracked delivery.
home.ctaDesc: Sizing, availability, orders — we answer everything.

particulier.heroDesc: Four pieces. Two tees, two trousers. Made in Portugal, available now.
particulier.paymentDesc: Credit card or PayPal. Encrypted data, no storage of your information.
particulier.shippingDesc: Free Colissimo tracked shipping for all orders in mainland France. 3–5 business days.
particulier.ecoDesc: We produce in controlled quantities. No overproduction, no clearance. Every piece is designed to stay in your wardrobe.

product.specsDesc: Composition, weight, cut — everything you need to know before ordering.
product.docsDesc: Measurements in centimetres. If in doubt between two sizes, go larger.
product.ctaSecurityNote: Secure payment. Free shipping in France. Returns within 30 days.

fumisterie.title: What matters you can't see
fumisterie.desc: Heavyweight cotton, French fleece, dense twill — materials selected for their durability, feel and ability to age well.
fumisterie.adviceDesc: Send us your chest, waist and hip measurements — we'll tell you exactly which size to order. Free, no commitment.

histoire.heroDesc: CST was born from a simple frustration: premium clothing that's made seriously, without the logo that accounts for 80% of the price, didn't exist.
histoire.philosophyDesc: A few perfectly mastered pieces are worth more than a broad, approximate collection.
histoire.workshopDesc1: Designed in Paris, made in Portugal. Every piece is developed in certified workshops that share our quality standards.
histoire.workshopDesc2: This choice isn't marketing. It's what lets us control every stitch, every weight, every finish — and sell durable pieces at an honest price.
histoire.testimonialsDesc: Feedback from our first customers on Drop 01 pieces.
histoire.ctaDesc: Four pieces. Limited stock. No restock.

precommande.heroDesc: Pieces available now. Free shipping in France, 3–5 business days.
precommande.step1Desc: Select your size and colour. Add to cart.
precommande.step2Desc: Credit card or PayPal. Encrypted data, nothing stored.
precommande.step3Desc: Your order is prepared and shipped within 48 business hours.
precommande.step4Desc: Tracked delivery. Free in mainland France.
precommande.securityText: 100% secure payment. Your data is never stored on our servers.
precommande.questionText: Write to us at {email} or use the contact form.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyDesc: Discover Drop 01 — four premium limited-edition pieces.
cart.confirmNote: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive an email with the summary and tracking information.

contact.title: We'll get back to you
contact.desc: Questions about sizing, orders, delivery — we're available.
contact.extendedDesc: The most useful answers before or after an order.

professionnel.heroDesc: Multi-brand boutiques, concept stores, resellers — contact the studio to discuss a partnership.

gauge.launchMessage: Limited stock. No restock once the drop sells out.
